warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
2 mins easy Row/AB/Ski
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats

strength.name: Back Squat
strength.description:
1x1 | *Shoulder blades to back pocket
*Ribcage to pelvis
*Screw feet out into floor | E3MOM x 22min

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
10 min AMRAP
150m Run
10 Toes-to-Bar
15 Alternating DB Snatches
@ 22.5/15kg
Scale T2B to V-ups or Tuck Sits

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back and biceps are antagonists to today's pressing/squatting, promoting recovery and postural balance.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Strength: Split Jerk, 3 by 2 at 75 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 150m Run, 10 Toes-to-Bar, 15 Alternating DB Snatches. For hypertrophy, focus on Back (lats/mid-back), Biceps, Rear Delts.
